reference: I have just started taking my pill again, Microgynon thirty. I have been taking it for sixteen days now. I had unprotected sexual intercourse five days ago and started the pack on my first day of my period. However, within the last two days, I have been feeling like I want to throw up. I have also been under stress. Could I be pregnant, or is it just stress?
text: I have just started to pill again, microgynon 30. I have been taking it for 16 days now. I had unprotected sexual intercourse five days ago and started the pack on my first day of my period. However, within the last two days, I have been feeling like I want to throw up. I have also been under stress. Could I be or is it just stress?
